key_findings: PARALLEL is already env-overridable via `PARALLEL=${PARALLEL:-48}` (line 4 of run_full_dns_pass.sh) — the controller writes to a setting file and the scanner reads it at chunk boundaries; only 4 lines of modification needed to the scanner
All four required control signals (error rate, ingest lag, sink lag, chunk completion rate) are already present in scan_persistence.db — zero new instrumentation needed

chunk_completion_rate_h is the most important signal for no-progress detection; when zero for 10+ minutes it directly feeds WO-00024 ALT-01 alert and also triggers the most aggressive PARALLEL reduction
Anti-flap mechanism (max 8 adjustments/hour + green streak of 3 before increase) prevents oscillation between PARALLEL values — critical given 5-minute eval interval
Atomic file write (os.replace on POSIX) ensures scanner never reads a partial PARALLEL value at chunk boundary
Controller failure (crash/exception) leaves PARALLEL_SETTING file with last known value — scanner fallback is implicit (reads the file or uses original env var default)

decisions.decision: Setting file (not env var injection) for PARALLEL value
decisions.rationale: File persists across controller restarts; env var would require process substitution or sourcing into scanner's shell environment

decisions.decision: 4 signals from SQLite (no log file parsing)
decisions.rationale: SQLite queries are sub-millisecond on warm cache; log parsing adds fragility; all signals already computed in WO-00024 monitoring queries
Safety asymmetry: faster to reduce (protect resolvers) than to increase (prevent overshoot); matches principle of conservative scale-up

decisions.decision: Green streak of 3 required before increase
decisions.rationale: 15-minute stability window ensures signal improvement is sustained, not a transient spike

scanner_patch.location: inside while loop before xargs call
scanner_patch.fallback: if setting file absent, uses original PARALLEL env var

risk_model.risk: Controller reduces PARALLEL too aggressively; scan stalls
risk_model.mitigation: PARALLEL_MIN=4 floor; ALT-01 fires after 30min no progress

risk_model.risk: chunk_error_rate_h unreliable if lines_in=0 (empty chunk files)
risk_model.mitigation: NULLIF(SUM(lines_in),0) returns NULL; null_behavior=green prevents false RED

risk_model.risk: Race between controller write and scanner read at chunk boundary
risk_model.mitigation: os.replace is atomic; scanner reads integer — partial reads impossible

recommended_actions: Deploy adaptive_controller.py with `nice -n 15` to minimize CPU impact on scanner
Apply 4-line patch to run_full_dns_pass.sh (reads state/parallel_setting.txt at chunk boundary)
Monitor logs/parallel_history.csv for first 2 hours to validate controller behavior
Run baseline (1 chunk at PARALLEL=48) before deploying to measure variance for comparison

cross_wo_dependencies.WO-00022: chunk_queue.lines_in/lines_out and completed_at timestamps required for chunk_error_rate_h and chunk_completion_rate_h signals
cross_wo_dependencies.WO-00024: chunk_completion_rate_h=0 feeds ALT-01; sink_lag_h feeds ALT-04; no_progress_evals>=6 same trigger as ALT-01
